summary: Senior DevOps Engineer specializing in infrastructure reliability, scalability, and security. Experienced in designing and automating CI/CD pipelines, managing cloud environments on AWS, and implementing GitOps and Infrastructure-as-Code practices at scale. Track record of reducing operational overhead, accelerating deployment frequency, and delivering highly available platforms across hybrid and cloud-native environments.

experience.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
highlights: Automated software configuration and deployments using Amazon EKS, Helm, Argo CD, GitHub Actions, and Terraform, enabling GitOps workflows across 3+ environments and accelerating release frequency by over 60%.
Deployed and managed hybrid cloud infrastructure using Huawei Cloud and AWS Outposts, integrating on-premises and cloud workloads to support 10+ production services.
Delivered resilient, highly available platforms through Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) practices, reducing manual configuration by 70% and improving deployment consistency across teams.
Partnered with 5+ development teams to streamline CI/CD release pipelines and enforce DevOps best practices, cutting mean time to deployment and reducing rollback incidents.

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
highlights: Implemented customer integrations and system automation using Ansible, Jenkins, Docker, and Linux, reducing deployment time by 50% and improving release reliability.
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines that reduced operational errors by 40% and standardized the software delivery process across multiple projects.
Investigated and resolved production issues in containerized environments, achieving 99.9% service availability and minimizing unplanned downtime.
Automated 15+ repetitive infrastructure tasks using Bash and Ansible, reclaiming approximately 8 engineering hours per week.

experience.title: Backend Engineer (PHP/Laravel)
highlights: Maintained and ensured 99% uptime for the company website, proactively resolving bugs before impacting end users.
Refactored legacy PHP/Laravel code, reducing technical debt and improving maintainability across key modules.
Optimized MySQL queries, reducing average page load time by 35% and improving overall application responsiveness.
